optional_scopes_for_full_screen_parity.reason: Needed only when the checker must verify org-level code security configuration attachment/default posture for repositories owned by an organization.

allowances.reason: Forks can have unavailable or upstream-owned enforcement surfaces; classify rather than mutate.
Archived repositories are immutable health inventory, not repair targets.

type_resolution_rules.rule: Repository topics can add types, but path, manifest, workflow, release, and API signals are stronger than topics alone.
A repo may have multiple artifact, language, and IaC types; all matching conditional checks apply unless approved drift excludes them.
Archived repos are classified, but mutating repair checks become report-only.

checks.applies_when: expected_maintainer_bypass_actors is not empty && repo.archived == false && repo.fork == false
repo.archived == false && repo.fork == false && package_manifests_present == true
tree contains .github/CODEOWNERS || tree contains CODEOWNERS || tree contains docs/CODEOWNERS
type.artifact_surface has docker_oci_image && type.workflow_surface has has_release_workflow
